name: mind-fight-club
description: MFC — club league for the mind

scripts.check:all: npm run check:syntax && npm run check:legacy && npm run check:duplicates

notes.legacy.js: Passes node --check because it uses var/function declarations compatible with CJS checker. ES module syntax (import/export) is absent — it relies on window.* globals set by ES modules loaded first. Checked separately via check:legacy.
